title: EnderPro Lite
description: Have access to many ender chests and be able to resize them. This is a free version of EnderPro.
body:
![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcbcf22c4418c4cc4fe58ab1230c2cbdb8082826.png)
[Click to see EnderPro](https://builtbybit.com/resources/enderpro.74153/)

[Click To Join Discord](https://discord.gg/a54cdSDDBA)

We are happy to hear your plugin ideas. Hit us up in our Discord. 

# EnderPro Lite

EnderPro Lite is the lightweight version of EnderPro, designed to run smoothly on any Minecraft server.
It offers seamless synchronization, multiple ender chest access, and simple setup while maintaining great performance.

## Features
Change Sizes

A feature every server is looking for.
Easily customize and adjust ender chest sizes to fit your needs.
Works seamlessly with the full EnderPro plugin.

## Multiple Ender Chests

Gain access to multiple ender chests for better item organization and storage flexibility.

# First Install

Automatically syncs players’ existing ender chests the first time you install the plugin, ensuring a smooth transition.

# Upgrade to Full Version

Enjoying EnderPro Lite?
Consider upgrading to the full version for access to many more features and advanced configuration options.

[Click here to visit EnderPro’s page](https://builtbybit.com/resources/enderpro.74153/)
